option.name: originalContent
option.value:
import { StrictMode } from 'react' import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client' import './index.css' import App from './App.tsx'
createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render( <StrictMode> <App /> </StrictMode>, )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
import { StrictMode } from 'react' import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client' import './index.css' import App from './App.tsx' import ErrorBoundary from './components/ErrorBoundary.tsx'
createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render( <StrictMode> <ErrorBoundary> <App /> </ErrorBoundary> </StrictMode>, )

option.name: originalContent
